{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = VC-U6 Rainbringer
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[VC-U6 Rainbringer]] is a portable variant of the chaos rifle made by a subsidiary of the [[Vallenar Corporation]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
